raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nowilke tas Keh- 
nisch fawn Gredsenü no fawas 
Rohkas/ un dewe to Amazam 
Medatus Dehłam/ tam Agagite- 
team to Judu Prettineekam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehnisch fazzija 
us Amanu: Tas Sudrabs tohp 
tew schtinkohts/ ir tee Landis/ 
ka tu ar teem darri/ kas tew 
patihk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tappe ta Kehnixa 
Skrihwerti fa-aizinati/treschapa- 
deymitā Deena pirmā Mehnefi/ 
un tappe rakstihts pehz wiſſu/ ko 
Amans pawehleja/ us ta Kehni- 
na Walditajeem/ un Semines- 
Waldneekteem/ kas pahr ikkatru 
Walstu bija/ un us ikkurrag 
Tautas Wirfneekeem/ ikveenai 
Walstat pehz fawas Walloças/ 
un ikweenot Tautai pehz fawas 
Mehles/ eekfh ta Kehnixa Aā- 
swerus Wahrdn tappe tas rak- 
stihts/ un ar ta Kehnixa Gre- 
dsenü aifsehgelehfs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Untahe Grahmatas tap- 
pe fuhtitas zaur to Tezzetaijo 
Rohku eeksh wiſſahn Walsti- 
bahm ta Kehnixa Aāswerus/ ka 
isdeldeți/ nokauti un nomaitati 
taptu wiſſi Judi/ tik labbi jauni 
ka wezzi/ Behrnini ka Seewas 
weenâ Deenâ/ treschapa deymitā 
Deenā ta diwipa deymits Meh- 
nes/ tas irr tas Mehnes Adars/ 
un ka winnu Manta taptu lau- 
pita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tahs Grahmatas Eek-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "schu-Raksts bija: Ka wee 
Banulis dohts taptu wi- 
Walstiväs/ kas wiſſeem Laud 
sinnams buhtu/ ka tee tai 
tchā Deena gattawi buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Tezzetaiji isgah 
n tappe peespeesti zaur ta K 
nixa Wahrdü. Un tas Ban 
tappe Suhfana Pilli dohts/ 
tas Kehnisch un Amans feh 
ja un dſehre/ bet tas Pillsfal 
Suhfans iſtruhzinajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta IV. Nodalla.
Mardakajus un wiſſi Judi tohp ta Keh 
Pauehleschanas labbad prett teem Jud 
tothi skummigi: 1/3. Mardakajus sta 
Esterci to wiſſu: 5/8.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad nu Mardakajus 
Jutte wiſſu/ kas bij n 
tizzis/ tad japlohf 
Mardakajus fatwas Drehbe 
n apwieke weenu Maifu ar P 
neent/ un wiſsch isgahje za 
Pilsfahta Widdu/ un brehze 
leelu un ruhktu Brehkfchanu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſsch nahze preek 
ta Kehnixa Wahrtim. Jo 
weens warreja ta Kehnixa Wat 
tis nahkt ar Maisfu apgehrbee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wiſſā un ikkatra Wa 
sta un Weetā/ furp ta Kehnix 
Wahrdā/ un winna Baufli 
tappe stahstita/ bija leelas Be 
das starp teem Judeem ar G 
veschanu/ un Raudaschanu/ u 
Behdaschanu / dauds gulles 
Maisfs un Peſnōs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze Esteres jauna 
Meitas/ un winnas Kambat 
Junkert/ un stahstija winnat to 
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
